# fileSize

**Instance Property**

The size of the app in bytes.

## Declaration

```swift
let fileSize: Measurement<UnitInformationStorage>?
```

## Obtaining general information

- **name**: The app’s localized name.
- **subtitle**: The app’s localized subtitle.
- **description**: The app’s localized description.
- **iconURL(fitting:)**: A URL for the icon of the app.
- **screenshotURLs(fitting:)**: An array of the app’s screenshot URLs.

items.description: A URL for the icon of the app.
items.name: iconURL(fitting:)

items.description: An array of the app’s screenshot URLs.
